blockingIssues.description: VAL-EXTRACT-002 NOT SATISFIED: Lecture 8 has only 10,659 chars vs required 26,000+ chars. Worker preserved existing 'String Operations' content instead of replacing with 'Memory Hierarchy' from lecture8_raw.txt.
VAL-EXTRACT-003 NOT SATISFIED: Lecture 9 has 24,068 chars vs required 26,000+ chars.
VAL-EXTRACT-004 NOT SATISFIED: Lecture 10 has 26,571 chars vs required 32,000+ chars.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance for content-worker: when raw file topic differs from existing section topic, document the mismatch and either (a) create new section for new topic or (b) extract what matches and clearly label gaps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: extract-lecture7-8 worker faced this decision and chose to preserve, leaving VAL-EXTRACT-002 unsatisfied.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create the content-worker skill file that was referenced in features.json but never implemented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both extract-lecture7-8 and extract-lecture9-10 reference skillName='content-worker' but the skill does not exist.
